urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: Dramatic video shows wildfire surround freight train in Canada
latest.summary: Dramatic video captured on July 13 shows a wildfire surrounding a freight train in Ontario, Canada. CN Rail temporarily suspended operations in the area and relocated employees for safety.
latest.details: Dramatic video captured on July 13 shows a wildfire surrounding a freight train in Ontario, Canada. CN Rail temporarily suspended operations in the area and relocated employees for safety. The workers seen in the video were able to escape and are safe. Multiple wildfires are currently burning across the northwestern part of the province. These fires remain out of control due to extreme heat, dry conditions, and strong winds. CN Rail told the BBC that it temporarily suspended operations in the area and relocated employees.
latest.full_brief: Dramatic video captured on July 13 shows a wildfire surrounding a freight train in Ontario, Canada. CN Rail temporarily suspended operations in the area and relocated employees for safety. The workers seen in the video were able to escape and are safe. Multiple wildfires are currently burning across the northwestern part of the province. These fires remain out of control due to extreme heat, dry conditions, and strong winds. CN Rail told the BBC that it temporarily suspended operations in the area and relocated employees.

latest.title: Israeli strike on police post in north Gaza kills seven, officials say
latest.summary: An Israeli air strike on a Hamas-run police post in Gaza has resulted in the deaths of at least seven individuals, including a senior officer. Witnesses reported that an Israeli drone launched four missiles at the post located near a busy market in Jabalia.
latest.details: An Israeli air strike on a Hamas-run police post in Gaza has resulted in the deaths of at least seven individuals, including a senior officer. Witnesses reported that an Israeli drone launched four missiles at the post located near a busy market in Jabalia. The Hamas-run interior ministry condemned the attack as a 'massacre' and confirmed that several police officers were among the casualties. The Israeli military identified the deceased as members of Hamas's military security, labeling them as 'terrorists. ' Additionally, two other fatalities were reported in southern Gaza due to Israeli fire, including a 10-year-old boy. Witnesses told the BBC that an Israeli drone fired four missiles at the post near a busy market in the Jabalia area of northern Gaza.
latest.full_brief: An Israeli air strike on a Hamas-run police post in Gaza has resulted in the deaths of at least seven individuals, including a senior officer. Witnesses reported that an Israeli drone launched four missiles at the post located near a busy market in Jabalia. The Hamas-run interior ministry condemned the attack as a 'massacre' and confirmed that several police officers were among the casualties. The Israeli military identified the deceased as members of Hamas's military security, labeling them as 'terrorists. ' Additionally, two other fatalities were reported in southern Gaza due to Israeli fire, including a 10-year-old boy. Witnesses told the BBC that an Israeli drone fired four missiles at the post near a busy market in the Jabalia area of northern Gaza.

latest.title: Sierra Leone drops treason charge against ex-president over attempted coup
latest.summary: Sierra Leone's government has dropped treason charges against ex-President Ernest Bai Koroma. The decision was made on health grounds, as stated by Information Minister Chernor Bah.
latest.details: Sierra Leone's government has dropped treason charges against ex-President Ernest Bai Koroma. The decision was made on health grounds, as stated by Information Minister Chernor Bah. Koroma has always denied involvement in an attempted coup that occurred nearly three years ago. Following his arrest, he was allowed to seek medical attention in Nigeria. The former president is now free to return to Sierra Leone at his convenience. The charges had been dropped on health grounds, Information Minister Chernor Bah told the BBC.
latest.full_brief: Sierra Leone's government has dropped treason charges against ex-President Ernest Bai Koroma. The decision was made on health grounds, as stated by Information Minister Chernor Bah. Koroma has always denied involvement in an attempted coup that occurred nearly three years ago. Following his arrest, he was allowed to seek medical attention in Nigeria. The former president is now free to return to Sierra Leone at his convenience. The charges had been dropped on health grounds, Information Minister Chernor Bah told the BBC.

latest.title: Celebrations as Gibraltar-Spain border fence removed
latest.summary: Large crowds celebrated the removal of the Gibraltar-Spain border fence, marking a significant change in border controls. The ceremony took place at midnight when a new treaty came into effect, allowing free movement between Gibraltar and Spain.
latest.details: Large crowds celebrated the removal of the Gibraltar-Spain border fence, marking a significant change in border controls. The ceremony took place at midnight when a new treaty came into effect, allowing free movement between Gibraltar and Spain. Chief Minister Fabian Picardo symbolically pulled down the fence, which had been in place for 118 years. The agreement was negotiated after Brexit and aims to ease the crossing for goods and people. This event represents a new era for Gibraltar's relationship with Spain. The symbolic ceremony took place at midnight, when a new treaty came into force removing the need for border checks at the crossing.
latest.full_brief: Large crowds celebrated the removal of the Gibraltar-Spain border fence, marking a significant change in border controls. The ceremony took place at midnight when a new treaty came into effect, allowing free movement between Gibraltar and Spain. Chief Minister Fabian Picardo symbolically pulled down the fence, which had been in place for 118 years. The agreement was negotiated after Brexit and aims to ease the crossing for goods and people. This event represents a new era for Gibraltar's relationship with Spain. The symbolic ceremony took place at midnight, when a new treaty came into force removing the need for border checks at the crossing.

latest.title: Air India crash report likely to be ready in October, say investigators
latest.summary: Investigators announced that a draft report on last year's Air India crash could be ready by October. The crash, which killed 260 people, occurred shortly after takeoff from Ahmedabad airport.
latest.details: Investigators announced that a draft report on last year's Air India crash could be ready by October. The crash, which killed 260 people, occurred shortly after takeoff from Ahmedabad airport. The investigation is currently in the analysis phase, with significant progress reported. The preliminary report indicated that fuel-control switches moved to the 'cut-off' position, leading to a total power loss. The investigation includes examining the psychological profiles of the crew members. The Aircraft Accident Investigation Bureau (AAIB) told the Supreme Court in an affidavit filed on Tuesday that it was currently "engaged in the analysis phase" of the investigation, which is expected to complete in around six weeks.
latest.full_brief: Investigators announced that a draft report on last year's Air India crash could be ready by October. The crash, which killed 260 people, occurred shortly after takeoff from Ahmedabad airport. The investigation is currently in the analysis phase, with significant progress reported. The preliminary report indicated that fuel-control switches moved to the 'cut-off' position, leading to a total power loss. The investigation includes examining the psychological profiles of the crew members. The Aircraft Accident Investigation Bureau (AAIB) told the Supreme Court in an affidavit filed on Tuesday that it was currently "engaged in the analysis phase" of the investigation, which is expected to complete in around six weeks.

brief_methodology.pl: Jedna zasada: przeczytać dostępny tekst artykułu i streścić jego sens. Komentarz musi być ścisłym streszczeniem artykułu. Nie wolno przepisywać poleceń redakcyjnych typu „Skomentuj”, podpisów, źródeł, kategorii ani urwanych fragmentów.
brief_methodology.en: One rule: read the available article text and summarise its meaning. The comment must be a strict article summary. Do not copy editorial commands, bylines, source notes, categories or clipped fragments.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.

rejected_examples.title: China economic growth falls sharply, missing target

same_story_dedupe.rule: One underlying event gets one homepage card, even if multiple publishers cover it with different links.
